creator: avg@FreeBSD.org
text:
on 21/11/2010 15:12 Koop Mast said the following:
> What Dimitry forgot to mention that this problem showed up while working on the binutils 2.17 update.
> Since this will be in head at some point it makes sense to get this fixed.

Not only that, but this bug troubled everyone using gcc44/45/46 from the ports
collection to build the ports in question.

-- 
Andriy Gapon
